title: Wind turbine and method for mounting a platform to a wall portion of a wind turbine
abstract: A wind turbine (1), comprising a wall portion (26), a plat- form (17), and a stay (27) suspending the platform (17) from the wall portion (26), wherein the stay (27) is pivotably connected to the platform (17) and/or the wall portion (26). The platform can be mounted inside a tower of the wind turbine even when the platform has a diameter that is significantly smaller than an inner tower diameter.
claims: Claims Patent claims 1. A wind turbine (1), comprising: a wall portion (26), a platform (17), and a stay (27) suspending the platform (17) from the wall portion (26), wherein the stay (27) is pivotably connected to the plat form (17) and/or the wall portion (26) . 2. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 1, configured for connecting a service stay (32) to the platform (17) and the wall portion (26), the service stay (32) suspending the plat form (17) from the wall portion (26) to allow replacement of the stay (27 ) . 3. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 2, wherein the service stay (32), when connected, forms at its connection points on the platform (17) and the wall portion (26) togeth er with connection points of the stay (27) on the platform (17) and the wall portion (26) a parallelogram (41) . 4. The wind turbine (1) according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the platform (17) and/or the wall portion (26) com prise holes (30, 31, 34, 35) at which the stay (27) is con nected pivotably and/or at which the service stay (32) is connectable . 5. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 4, wherein one or more of the holes (30, 31, 34, 35) are configured as slotted holes . 6. The wind turbine (1) according to any one of claims 1 to 5, comprising the service stay (32) . 7. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 6, wherein the service stay (32) is configured to be shortened and extended. 8. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 7, wherein the service stay (32) comprises hydraulic or electric means for shortening and extension. 9. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 7 or 8, wherein the service stay (32) is configured to be locked at a desired state when shortened or extended. 10. The wind turbine (1) according to any one of claims 1 to 9, comprising a tower (5) including the wall portion (26), and wherein a diameter (Dl) of the platform (17) is smaller than an inner diameter (D2) of the tower (5) at the wall portion (26) such that a gap (28) is formed between the platform (17) and the wall portion (26) . 11. The wind turbine (1) according to claim 10, comprising a spacer (38) arranged between the platform (17) and the wall portion (26), the spacer being configured to bridge the gap (28) so as to fix the platform (17) in the horizontal direc tion . 12. The wind turbine (1) according to any one of claims 1 to 11, wherein the platform (17) comprises a low voltage trans former ( 42 ) . 13. A method for mounting a platform (17) to a wall portion (26) of a wind turbine (1), comprising: a) connecting (SI) a stay (27) pivotably to one of the platform (17) or the wall portion (26), b) pivoting (S2) the stay (27) and connecting the stay (27) to the other one of the platform (17) and the wall portion (26) to suspend the platform (17) from the wall portion (26) . 14. The method according to claim 13, comprising the steps of : connecting (S3) a service stay (32) to the platform (17) and the wall portion (26), replacing (S4) the stay (27), and disconnecting (S5) the service stay (32) from the plat form (17) and the wall tower portion (26) .
